description: Configure a 'Net 30' payment option for B2B clients. Create a 'Wholesale Buyer' user role and a user account with username 'corporate_buyer' and email 'corp@example.com' assigned to that role. Set up and enable a manual payment gateway labeled 'Net 30 Invoice' (Display Label: 'Net 30 Invoice') with the instructions 'Payment due within 30 days of invoice date. Please include Order ID in wire transfer.' The gateway must be configured so it is only available to customers with the 'Wholesale Buyer' role.
